languages.text: "Она уникальна. Единственная в своем роде". {n}Оптические аугменты техножрицы вспыхивают, а в голосе появляется неожиданный пыл.{/n} "В логис-летописях Адептус Механикус этот трон идентифицируется, как святыня, способная автономно осуществлять ритуалы аугментации. Ее гибель недопустима, и любое попустительство в ее отношении является святотатством".

"It is unique. One of a kind." {n}The Tech-Priest's optical augments flash, and surprising fervour creeps into her voice.{/n} "In the Logis Annals of the Adeptus Mechanicus, this throne is identified as a shrine capable of autonomous augmentation rituals. Its loss is unacceptable, and any condoning of it is sacrilege."
languages.original_text: "Она уникальна. Единственная в своем роде". {n}Оптические аугменты техножрицы вспыхивают, а в голосе появляется неожиданный пыл.{/n} "В логис-летописях Адептус Механикус этот трон идентифицируется, как святыня, способная автономно осуществлять ритуалы аугментации. Ее гибель недопустима, и любое попустительство в ее отношении является святотатством".

traits.locale_text: "It is unique. One of a kind." {n}The Tech-Priest's optical augments flash, and surprising fervour creeps into her voice.{/n} "In the Logis Annals of the Adeptus Mechanicus, this throne is identified as a shrine capable of autonomous augmentation rituals. Its loss is unacceptable, and any condoning of it is sacrilege."

"It is unique. One of a kind." {n}The Tech-Priest's optical augments flash, and surprising fervour creeps into her voice.{/n} "In the Logis Annals of the Adeptus Mechanicus, this throne is identified as a shrine capable of autonomous augmentation rituals. Its loss is unacceptable, and any condoning of it is sacrilege."

"It is unique. One of a kind." {n}The Tech-Priest's optical augments flash, and surprising fervour creeps into her voice.{/n} "In the Logis Annals of the Adeptus Mechanicus, this throne is identified as a shrine capable of autonomous augmentation rituals. Its loss is unacceptable, and any condoning of it is sacrilege."

languages.text: “它独一无二，举世无双。”{n}技术神甫的光学植入物闪了闪，声音里流露出惊人的狂热之情。{/n}“在机械修会的《逻辑编年史》中，此王座被视为能够自主执行植入物仪式的圣坛。失去它是绝不可接受的，对此事放任不管就是亵渎。”
languages.original_text: "It is unique. One of a kind." {n}The Tech-Priest's optical augments flash, and surprising fervour creeps into her voice.{/n} "In the Logis Annals of the Adeptus Mechanicus, this throne is identified as a shrine capable of autonomous augmentation rituals. Its loss is unacceptable, and any condoning of it is sacrilege."

traits.locale_text: “它独一无二，举世无双。”{n}技术神甫的光学植入物闪了闪，声音里流露出惊人的狂热之情。{/n}“在机械修会的《逻辑编年史》中，此王座被视为能够自主执行植入物仪式的圣坛。失去它是绝不可接受的，对此事放任不管就是亵渎。”

languages.text: «Es único. No hay otro igual». {n}Los aumentos ópticos de la tecnosacerdotisa destellan y su voz se llena de un fervor poco habitual.{/n} «En los anales de logos del Adeptus Mechanicus, se identifica que este trono es un altar capaz de rituales autónomos de aumento. Su pérdida sería inaceptable y condonarla sería un acto sacrílego».
languages.original_text: "It is unique. One of a kind." {n}The Tech-Priest's optical augments flash, and surprising fervour creeps into her voice.{/n} "In the Logis Annals of the Adeptus Mechanicus, this throne is identified as a shrine capable of autonomous augmentation rituals. Its loss is unacceptable, and any condoning of it is sacrilege."

traits.locale_text: «Es único. No hay otro igual». {n}Los aumentos ópticos de la tecnosacerdotisa destellan y su voz se llena de un fervor poco habitual.{/n} «En los anales de logos del Adeptus Mechanicus, se identifica que este trono es un altar capaz de rituales autónomos de aumento. Su pérdida sería inaceptable y condonarla sería un acto sacrílego».

languages.text: « Cette machine est unique. Il n'en existe pas deux comme elle. » {n}Les augmentations optiques de la technoprêtresse se mettent à briller, et une ferveur étonnante emplit sa voix.{/n} « Dans les annales des logis de l'Adeptus Mechanicus, ce fauteuil est identifié comme un autel capable de rituels d'augmentation autonomes. Sa perte est inacceptable, et tout propos cautionnant une telle idée est blasphématoire. »
languages.original_text: "It is unique. One of a kind." {n}The Tech-Priest's optical augments flash, and surprising fervour creeps into her voice.{/n} "In the Logis Annals of the Adeptus Mechanicus, this throne is identified as a shrine capable of autonomous augmentation rituals. Its loss is unacceptable, and any condoning of it is sacrilege."

traits.locale_text: « Cette machine est unique. Il n'en existe pas deux comme elle. » {n}Les augmentations optiques de la technoprêtresse se mettent à briller, et une ferveur étonnante emplit sa voix.{/n} « Dans les annales des logis de l'Adeptus Mechanicus, ce fauteuil est identifié comme un autel capable de rituels d'augmentation autonomes. Sa perte est inacceptable, et tout propos cautionnant une telle idée est blasphématoire. »

languages.text: "O eşsizdir. Türünün tek örneğidir." {n}Tekno Rahip'in optik ogmentleri parlıyor, sesine şaşırtıcı bir şevk sızıyor.{/n} "Adeptus Mechanicus'un Logis Yıllıkları, bu tahtı otonom ogmentasyon ayinleri gerçekleştirebilen bir tapınak olarak tanımlar. Kaybı kabul edilemez ve buna göz yummak kâfirlik olur."
languages.original_text: "It is unique. One of a kind." {n}The Tech-Priest's optical augments flash, and surprising fervour creeps into her voice.{/n} "In the Logis Annals of the Adeptus Mechanicus, this throne is identified as a shrine capable of autonomous augmentation rituals. Its loss is unacceptable, and any condoning of it is sacrilege."

traits.locale_text: "O eşsizdir. Türünün tek örneğidir." {n}Tekno Rahip'in optik ogmentleri parlıyor, sesine şaşırtıcı bir şevk sızıyor.{/n} "Adeptus Mechanicus'un Logis Yıllıkları, bu tahtı otonom ogmentasyon ayinleri gerçekleştirebilen bir tapınak olarak tanımlar. Kaybı kabul edilemez ve buna göz yummak kâfirlik olur."

languages.text: "Sie ist einzigartig. Etwas ganz Besonders." {n}Die optischen Augmentationen der Techpriesterin funkeln und ihre Stimme klingt erstaunliche leidenschaftlich.{/n} "In den Logis-Annalen des Adeptus Mechanicus wird dieser Thron als Schrein geführt, der autonome Augmentationsrituale durchführen kann. Sein Verlust wäre inakzeptabel, ihn hinzunehmen, ein Sakrileg."
languages.original_text: "It is unique. One of a kind." {n}The Tech-Priest's optical augments flash, and surprising fervour creeps into her voice.{/n} "In the Logis Annals of the Adeptus Mechanicus, this throne is identified as a shrine capable of autonomous augmentation rituals. Its loss is unacceptable, and any condoning of it is sacrilege."

traits.locale_text: "Sie ist einzigartig. Etwas ganz Besonders." {n}Die optischen Augmentationen der Techpriesterin funkeln und ihre Stimme klingt erstaunliche leidenschaftlich.{/n} "In den Logis-Annalen des Adeptus Mechanicus wird dieser Thron als Schrein geführt, der autonome Augmentationsrituale durchführen kann. Sein Verlust wäre inakzeptabel, ihn hinzunehmen, ein Sakrileg.

languages.text: 「これは唯一無二のものだ。他に類を見ないものだ。」{n}テクプリストの視覚増幅器が光り、彼女の声に驚きの熱意がこもる。{/n}「アデプタ・メカニクスのロギス・アナールズによると、この王座は自律的な増幅儀式を行う神聖な場所である。その喪失は許されず、それを容認することは聖なる行為に反する。」
languages.original_text: "It is unique. One of a kind." {n}The Tech-Priest's optical augments flash, and surprising fervour creeps into her voice.{/n} "In the Logis Annals of the Adeptus Mechanicus, this throne is identified as a shrine capable of autonomous augmentation rituals. Its loss is unacceptable, and any condoning of it is sacrilege."

traits.locale_text: 「これは唯一無二のものだ。他に類を見ないものだ。」{n}テクプリストの視覚増幅器が光り、彼女の声に驚きの熱意がこもる。{/n}「アデプタ・メカニクスのロギス・アナールズによると、この王座は自律的な増幅儀式を行う神聖な場所である。その喪失は許されず、それを容認することは聖なる行為に反する。」
